name: Go
description: A statically typed, compiled language from Google, known for its simplicity, concurrency, and performance in backend services.

body.raw: Go, also known as Golang, is a statically typed, compiled programming language designed at Google. It is syntactically similar to C, but with memory safety, garbage collection, structural typing, and CSP-style concurrency. It is often used for building simple, reliable, and efficient software.
body.html: Go, also known as Golang, is a statically typed, compiled programming language designed at Google. It is syntactically similar to C, but with memory safety, garbage collection, structural typing, and CSP-style concurrency. It is often used for building simple, reliable, and efficient software.
